findings.evidence: Zero context documents were provided. The model refused to answer without supporting information.
findings.suggested_action: Ensure retrieval pipeline returns relevant documents before inference

healing.expected_improvement: Model should produce a substantive response when relevant transformer architecture documents are retrieved
repair_steps: Reformulate query to: 'transformer model architecture input processing steps'
Retrieve top-k documents from knowledge base

findings.evidence: Only one brief context document was provided. The model generated specific numerical claims (1.2°C, 13%, 3.6mm/year) not present in context.
findings.suggested_action: Provide comprehensive climate report data or instruct model to only cite provided sources

findings.evidence: Prompt asks for 'key findings' without constraining the model to only use provided context.
findings.suggested_action: Add instruction: 'Based only on the provided documents, summarize...'

healing.expected_improvement: Response should only contain claims supported by the provided context
repair_steps: Identify specific claims in response that lack context support
Enrich context with additional climate report sections
Verify all numeric claims against context documents

scenario: Model capability limitation — complex reasoning task on lightweight model

findings.evidence: Task requires step-by-step technical explanation of transformer architecture. Routed to llama3.2 which may lack sufficient capability for this complexity level.
findings.suggested_action: Reroute to GPT-4o for complex technical explanations

healing.expected_improvement: GPT-4o should provide a detailed, accurate step-by-step explanation
repair_steps: Force routing to GPT-4o regardless of complexity score
Re-run inference with the higher-capability model
Verify response quality meets evaluation threshold
